findings.snippet: for (const point of overview.dailyRevenue) rows.push([point.date, point.value]);
for (const m of overview.channelMix) rows.push([ANALYTICS_CHANNEL_LABEL[m.channel], m.revenue, m.orders]);
for (const ing of ingredients) stockMap.set(ing.id, Number(ing.currentStock));
prisma.ingredient.findMany({ where: { id: { in: ingredientIds }, userId: input.userId } }

recommendations: Add @@index on userId or workspaceId for: AuditRetentionPolicy, PartnerRevenue, StorefrontCampaign, StorefrontInventoryItem, StorefrontMenuSchedule, StorefrontPage, StorefrontReservation, StorefrontTeamInviteEvent….
Adopt deletedAt soft-delete standard on high-churn entities (Order, Product, Customer).
Review N+1 loops in services — batch with findMany + in-memory map or include.
Cap findMany with take + cursor pagination; use SERVICE_DEFAULT_TAKE in list paths.
